header.qr_scan_desc: Scan this code to open the snippet on another device.
header.jump_to_desc: Enter the snippet ID to navigate directly to it.

tools.title: Secure Tools & Utilities
tools.subtitle: A collection of secure, client-side tools designed to keep your sensitive data protected. Your data never leaves your device.
tools.encrypt_desc: Select a folder or files to encrypt. The full folder structure will be preserved and encrypted.
tools.decrypt_desc: Select encrypted files to decrypt. The original folder structure will be restored.
tools.encrypt_error: Encryption failed. Please check your key and try again.
tools.decrypt_error: Decryption failed. Please check your key and try again.
tools.drag_drop_prompt: Drag & drop files or folders here
tools.write_back_success: Files have been written back and replaced original structure in the folder.
tools.password_manager_description: Securely manage all your passwords and sensitive information
tools.password_manager_read_more_description: Since this is zero‑knowledge encryption, your password cannot be recovered. If you have forgotten it, you must clear your browser data for this site to start over, which will permanently delete your local vault.
tools.password_manager_cannot_recover_desc: If you lose your master password, your vault data is permanently inaccessible.
tools.password_manager_reset_vault_desc: To start over, you must clear your local browser data. This permanently deletes your current encrypted vault.
tools.password_manager_error: Failed to unlock vault. Check your master password.
tools.password_detail_empty_desc: Choose a password from the list
tools.password_detail_update_desc: It's time to update your password. Update now
tools.password_manager_onboarding_subtitle: Your passwords and secrets, encrypted locally. Only you hold the key.
tools.password_manager_onboarding_feature_zero: We cannot see or access your passwords.
tools.password_manager_create_subtitle: Make it strong and memorable. This is the only key to your vault.
tools.password_manager_warning_desc: Snipit uses Zero-Knowledge encryption. This means we do not store your master password anywhere.
tools.password_manager_warning_irrecoverable: If you forget your master password, your vault data is permanently lost and cannot be recovered by anyone.
tools.password_manager_warning_checkbox: I understand that my master password cannot be recovered.
tools.password_manager_unlock_subtitle: Enter your master password to unlock your vault
tools.password_manager_cloud_vault_desc: We found an encrypted vault associated with your account in the cloud. Would you like to sync it to this device?
tools.password_manager_upload_file_desc: Select a file to automatically fill details
tools.password_manager_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

errors.storage_access_denied: Storage access denied. Please enable cookies/storage for full functionality.
errors.storage_save_failed: Failed to save data. Local storage may be full or disabled.

common.auth_required_desc: Creating private or shared snippets requires an account to manage access control and ownership.
common.enter_password_desc: This snippet is password protected. Please enter the password to view it.
common.discussion_desc: Share your thoughts and collaborate with others on this snippet.
common.comment_restricted: You don't have permission to comment on this snippet.
common.redirect_desc: Click the button below to visit the shared destination link.
common.admin_preview_banner: Admin Preview: Automatic redirection is disabled for creators and admins to allow configuration.

profile.guest_hint: Create an account to sync snippets across devices

home.paste_system_id_desc: Generates a secure 5-character alphanumeric ID (e.g., a1b2c)

video.setup_desc: Paste a video URL or upload a video file to watch together.
video.stream_link: Paste movie or video stream link

home.link_desc: Paste the long URL below to create a short, redirecting link.
home.link_ready_desc: Your short link is ready to share
home.file_drop: Drop your file here or click to browse

dynamic_id_dialog.title: Enter Custom ID
dynamic_id_dialog.description: Choose a unique identifier. This will be used in your snippet's URL.

home.ai_id_suggested: AI Suggested an ID based on content!

display.burn_after_read_warning: Warning: This is a one-time snippet and will be deleted after being read.

history.no_history_desc: Your snippet history will appear here
history.sync_failed: Failed to sync your account snippets

messages.id_conflict: This ID is already taken. Please try another one.
messages.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this snippet?
messages.password_required: Password is required when password protection is enabled

about_page.title: About
about_page.subtitle: A passion project built by two developers who believe in making code sharing simple and beautiful.
about_page.features_subtitle: Everything you need for seamless code sharing

syntax_highlighting.title: Syntax Highlighting
syntax_highlighting.desc: Beautiful code display with support for 15+ programming languages.

sharing.title: Easy Sharing
sharing.desc: Share your snippets effortlessly with a simple link or QR code.

drawing.title: Interactive Drawing
drawing.desc: Collaborative whiteboard to sketch ideas and diagrams alongside your code.

terminal_execution.title: Interactive Terminal
terminal_execution.desc: Run your code snippets (Bash, Python, Java, etc.) directly in the integrated high-performance terminal.

ai_edit_assistant.title: AI Edit Assistant
ai_edit_assistant.desc: Enhance your code, fix bugs, or explain logic using integrated AI assistant.

real_time_collaboration.title: Real-time Collaboration
real_time_collaboration.desc: Edit code and draw together in real-time with live cursors and presence.

file_share.title: File Sharing
file_share.desc: Upload and share files securely with a unique link.

redirect_urls.title: Shorten Links
redirect_urls.desc: Create short, manageable links that redirect to any destination instantly.

ai_detection.title: AI Language Detection
ai_detection.desc: Automatically detects programming languages using AI technology.

save_as_export.title: Flexible Export
save_as_export.desc: Download your snippets in multiple formats including PDF, Plain Text, or language-specific extensions.

expiration.title: Expiration Control
expiration.desc: Set snippets to expire after 1 hour to 1 year, choose a custom date, or keep them forever.

custom_ids.title: Custom URLs
custom_ids.desc: Create memorable, custom URLs for easy snippet sharing.

password.title: Enhanced Security
password.desc: Protect sensitive code with passwords and manage granular access permissions.

access_control.title: Role-Based Access Control
access_control.desc: Grant Viewer, Editor, or Admin roles to specific users for precise collaboration control.

profile.title: User Profiles
profile.desc: Create an account to manage, edit, and keep track of your snippets.

dark_mode.title: Dark Mode
dark_mode.desc: Easy on the eyes with a beautiful dark theme option.

multi_language.title: Multi-Language UI
multi_language.desc: Interface available in English, German, Hindi, Japanese, and Marathi.

labels.title: Smart Labels
labels.desc: Organize your snippets with a powerful, user-specific labeling system. Tag and categorize your code for instant retrieval and a personalized organization experience.

music_integration.title: Zero-Bandwidth Music
music_integration.desc: Stream your favorite songs directly within your workspace using low-bandwidth background players, custom bitrates, and a proxy-secured MP3 downloader.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: Snipit was born from a simple idea: code sharing should be beautiful, fast, and effortless. As developers, we found ourselves constantly sharing code snippets with colleagues, friends, and the community, but existing solutions felt clunky and outdated.
story.p2: So we decided to build something better. Snipit combines elegant design with powerful functionality, making it the perfect tool for developers who care about both form and function.
story.p3: Built with modern web technologies and a focus on user experience, Snipit aims to be the go-to platform for code sharing in the developer community.

contribute.title: Get in Touch
contribute.desc: We would love to hear from you! Whether you have questions, feedback, or just want to say hello, feel free to reach out to us through any of the channels below.

free.question: Is Snipit free to use?
free.answer: Yes! Snipit is completely free to use. You can use it for personal or commercial projects without any cost.

expiration.question: How long do snippets last?
expiration.answer: You can choose the expiration time for each snippet, ranging from 1 hour to 1 year. You can also create snippets that never expire.

secure.question: Is my code secure?
secure.answer: We take security seriously. All snippets are encrypted in transit and at rest. Password-protected snippets add an extra layer of security.

edit.question: Can I edit my snippets later?
edit.answer: Yes, if you are logged in when you create a snippet, you can edit or delete it later from your dashboard.

server_error.title: System Offline
server_error.subtitle: We're having trouble connecting to our core services. Our team has been notified and is working on a fix.

error_page.title: Page Not Found
error_page.subtitle: Oops! The snippet you're looking for doesn't exist or has expired.
error_page.description: It might have been deleted, the link could be incorrect, or the snippet may have reached its expiration date.

auth.login_subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your snippets.
auth.signup_subtitle: Create an account to start managing your snippets.
auth.logout_confirm_question: Are you sure you want to logout?
auth.forgot_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link
auth.forgot_password_success_subtitle: Check your email for the reset link
auth.forgot_password_success_message: We've sent a password reset link to
auth.forgot_password_success_check_inbox: Please check your inbox and follow the instructions.
auth.forgot_password_success_toast: Reset link sent to your email
auth.reset_password_min_length_toast: Password must be at least 6 characters

transliteration.tooltip_enable: Enable phonetic typing — type in English, get {{language}}

ai_dialog.title: AI Editor Assistant
ai_dialog.description: Transform the selected text. Tell AI what you want to do.
ai_dialog.placeholder: e.g. Make this more professional, or summarize into key points.
ai_dialog.error_failed: Failed to get a valid response from AI.

ai.draw_description: Describe the diagram or flowchart you want to create, and AI will generate it for you.
ai.draw_placeholder: e.g., A simple flowchart for user login process with success and failure states.
ai.draw_empty_description: Please describe what you want to draw
ai.draw_error: Failed to generate diagram. Please try again.

ai_writer.title: AI Writer
ai_writer.description: Describe what you want to write, and AI will generate it for you.
ai_writer.placeholder: e.g. Write a React component for a login form...

tooltips.write_code: Write a high-quality code snippet based on my request.
tooltips.explain_write: Explain the logic and then write the code.
tooltips.refactor_ideas: Suggest ways to refactor this idea into code.
